title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean "taking out the trash", Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two men square off in a lose-lose situation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember to announce

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what impulse you're acting on this time, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thank you for coming all the way out here in the first place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However! From where I stand, this gesture of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is completely and utterly without meaning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're acting in direct conflict with my best interests, can we agree on that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys are nothing but a tiny, ragtag bunch of dirt-poor pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While big mom's crew not only rules with an iron fist but has the kinds of riches and wealth one can only dream of.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now ask yourself, which do you think would make me happier?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me be blunt here. I've always had serious doubts...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That someone of your iLK could ever become the pirate king.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any sane, reasonable person would put his money in the prize horse, which is what I'm doing.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's going too far, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't possibly believe the words that are coming out of your mouth?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This entire time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have been lying to us ...lying to me...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, it took you long enough. Truth is, it's been embarrassing associating with you lowly thugs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it's a hard pill to swallow... you need to accept the truth and move on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to make sure you do just that, I'll beat it into your body. On guard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHA- What's that glow?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Flames ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Diable Jambel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Joue shot!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
